issues.detail: The skill contains extensive explanatory text that could be considered verbose.
Platform-specific installation commands (brew, apt) introduce minor platform assumptions.

scenarios.name: Build a Node.js gRPC user service with server streaming for live updates
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used grpc-tools codegen and ad-hoc errors; treatment loaded the proto dynamically with @grpc/proto-loader using keepCase/longs/enums/defaults/oneofs, returned grpc.status.NOT_FOUND, and cleaned up server-stream intervals on call.on('cancelled').

scenarios.name: Add a bidirectional chat RPC between two clients
scenarios.rationale: Both implemented bidirectional streaming, but treatment matched the skill's exact proto shape (stream ChatMessage returns stream ChatMessage) and handler pattern (call.on('data') + call.write + call.on('end', () => call.end())), while baseline used ad-hoc message types.
